## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content creation workflow, review recent outputs, and explore strategies for efficient collaboration and content distribution.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shifting to Thursday meetings for better team availability and preparation](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [New content workflow: G shares thoughts on Fridays, Aida prepares draft by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Exploring "post-browser world" concept for future marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Reviewing and refining AI-generated content based on recent podcast snippet](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

## Topics

### Meeting Logistics

  - [Agreed to move recurring meeting to Thursdays for better team availability](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Exploring earlier time slots to accommodate European team members](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Aim to make meetings more efficient and productive](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

### Content Creation Workflow

  - [New process: G to share thoughts/themes on Fridays](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Aida to prepare draft content by following Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Allows for 5-day turnaround on new content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Planning to front-load content before G's upcoming vacation](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

### AI-Generated Content Review

  - [Reviewed blog post and LinkedIn content based on recent podcast snippet](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Team agreed content is closer to G's voice and style compared to previous attempts](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Discussing potential platforms for publication (Substack vs. new website)](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)

### Future of E-commerce and Marketing

  - [G presented concept of "post-browser world" where AI agents handle purchases](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Potential shift away from traditional e-commerce sites and marketing funnels](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [Explored implications for B2C and B2B transactions](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Discussed potential resistance and technological barriers to implementation](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### LinkedIn Strategy

  - [Marcel shared recent success with LinkedIn post (700+ comments)](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Detailed strategy for engagement: DMing commenters, creating back-and-forth conversations](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Emphasis on meaningful, high-quality posts over frequent, lower-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1903.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and finalize AI-generated blog post and LinkedIn content](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [Confirm publication platform (likely Substack for now)](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [Implement new content creation workflow (Friday thoughts, Wednesday drafts)](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Explore automation possibilities for LinkedIn engagement strategy](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Schedule next meeting for Thursday at an earlier time slot](https://fathom.video/share/6ZVuQX9vZ-9QiT9SPqCg2Qu2SymV-oxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
